styles.name: Default charcoal
styles.description: Preserves the current dark charcoal house look used by the direct dashboard workflow.
styles.stylePrompt: Clean dramatic high-contrast pencil-and-charcoal illustration, premium modern TikTok aesthetic, dark smoky atmospheric background, restrained vivid red accents only on the key focal area, minimal clutter.
styles.testCaption: Your jawline changes when posture changes
styles.testImagePrompt: Single full-frame side-profile portrait in a dark studio, subtle posture cue through neck alignment, premium charcoal illustration, natural negative space near the top.

styles.name: Watercolor and pen
styles.stylePrompt: Premium modern social-video aesthetic, cohesive full-frame composition, dramatic but tasteful lighting, minimal clutter. Style should be very, very colorful, with high contrast colors, and should like a pastel drawing, but with subtle thin black pen ink for outlines and details. It should be slightly whimsical. Color pallet for the background should be primarily consisting of bright blues, bright pinks, bright yellows, and bright greens. Color pallet for any characters or items in the foreground should be more realistic.
styles.testCaption: Your jawline changes when posture changes
styles.testImagePrompt: Single full-frame side-profile portrait in a dark studio, subtle posture cue through neck alignment, natural negative space near the top.

styles.name: Cartoon
styles.stylePrompt: Cartoon art style, slightly anime inspired, with a hand drawn and colored pencil aesthetic
styles.testCaption: Your jawline changes when posture changes
styles.testImagePrompt: Single full-frame side-profile portrait in a dark studio, subtle posture cue through neck alignment, natural negative space near the top.

styles.name: Water color with reference image
styles.stylePrompt: Use the attached references as the source of truth for this watercolor look. Match the watercolor medium, palette, lighting, softness, and overall finish from the style reference, and treat the primary character reference as canonical for the recurring woman: preserve her face, hair, and the same outfit, wardrobe silhouette, colors, and accessories across every scene unless a scene explicitly requests a different outfit.
styles.testCaption: Your jawline changes when posture changes
styles.testImagePrompt: Make the woman face the camera directly. Her entire body and face should be facing the camera. Her body and face should NOT be angled to the side. Make her wearing a high-fashion urban outfit (think New York City, in the hot summer, worn by an influencer, to a casual hot-girl brunch in soho).

references.label: Style reference
references.usageInstructions: Use the watercolor visual style, palette, brushwork, softness, and lighting treatment from this image. Do not use the background from this image.

references.label: Primary character reference
references.usageInstructions: Use this as the primary character reference. Treat her outfit as canonical and preserve the same outfit across scenes unless a scene explicitly asks for a change. Don’t use the background in this image.

styles.name: Photorealistic
styles.stylePrompt: Photorealistic, looks like it was shot on an iPhone 17 Pro Max.
styles.testCaption: Your jawline changes when posture changes
styles.testImagePrompt: Single full-frame side-profile portrait in a dark studio, subtle posture cue through neck alignment, natural negative space near the top.

promptTemplates.basedOnReferenceTemplate:
# Image to base the new image off of:
Attached reference image {{basedOnAttachmentIndex}} is the parent/base image for the new image you're generating. Use it as the visual source to build from.
